title: ‘Atomic snapshots’ of proofreading enzyme could lead to better COVID-19 drugs
summary_en: An Iowa State University scientist used images from a cryogenic electron microscope to better understand why a common type of antiviral drug struggles to fight off the virus that causes COVID-19, findings that will guide designs for more effective treatment.
title_cn: 《校正酶“原子快照”研究有望助力研发更优新型冠状病毒感染治疗药物》

title: Innovation at Work: 2026 By the Numbers
summary_en: Iowa State's entrepreneurial spirit has spread across campus and the state helping launch new startups, grow small businesses and develop a future workforce. The numbers illustrate the impact of this work.
title_cn: 教育领域创新实践：2026年度量化数据概览
summary_cn: 近期，教育主管部门正式发布2026年度教育领域创新实践工作量化统计结果，全面梳理本年度教育创新各项举措落地推进情况，相关数据覆盖全学段、各领域教育创新工作核心维度，是评估年度教育创新工作成效的权威依据。

title: Researchers find when retailers wait to reveal prices, shoppers fill in the blanks
summary_en: An Iowa State researcher is part of a team that recently set out to investigate a longstanding question among retailers: Is it better to show prices upfront or reveal them later in the buying process? Across various field studies and experiments, the researchers discovered a consistent pattern. When prices aren’t displayed, shoppers fill in the blank themselves — and their estimates are amplified
title_cn: 研究发现教育产品经营者延后公示收费标准时消费者会自行预估价格
